title: Spicy Korean-Style Stir-Fry
description: A spicy and savory stir-fry dish inspired by Korean cuisine, perfect for a quick dinner.
instructions: Heat 1 tsp of oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger, stir-fry for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the stir-fry vegetables, cook until tender-crisp, about 3-4 minutes.
In a small bowl, whisk together the tahini, rice vinegar, soy sauce (if using), and fermented Korean chili paste.
Pour the tahini mixture over the vegetables, stir-fry for 1-2 minutes until coated.
Add the Korean chili flakes and cook for an additional minute.
Serve the spicy Korean-style stir-fry over cooked rice, garnished with sesame seeds.
Adjust the spice level to taste by adding more Korean chili flakes or fermented Korean chili paste.
